concept: AdVenture Capitalist is an idle clicker game where players begin by manually tapping small businesses to generate income, then strategically invest profits to upgrade existing ventures or acquire new, more lucrative ones. The core mechanic involves hiring managers to automate income generation, allowing profits to accumulate even while offline, fostering continuous growth of the capitalist empire. Progression is driven by expanding across different planets (Earth, Moon, Mars), unlocking increasingly complex businesses, and leveraging "Angel Investors" through soft resets to gain permanent, multiplicative profit boosts. Controls are primarily tap-based for purchasing, upgrading, and activating boosts. Monetization includes in-app purchases for Gold, a premium currency used to buy Time Warps, specific managers, or other powerful boosts, alongside third-party advertising.
name: AdVenture Capitalist
